name: Totally not lesbian sleepover
description:
Slight variation of someone's bot for all them lesbians and sapphics.

I legit just tried someone's bot, liked the concept but didn't want to be a guy so I copied pasted it and changed some things. Up for further editing, probably to make it more unique.

(If you want the original, just search "sleepover" and find the bot with the same pf. It should be near the top.)
creator: Kryssy
